title: Terms of Service
metaDescription: Terms of Service for OmniKit. Read the terms and conditions for using our free online developer tools.
overviewP1: Welcome to OmniKit ("we", "us", or "our"), operating this website (the "Site"). OmniKit is a free, open-source collection of browser-based developer tools designed to help you with everyday development tasks.
overviewP2: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Site and all tools, features, and services provided through it (collectively, the "Services"). By accessing or using the Site, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
acceptanceP1: By accessing or using any part of the Site, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to all of these Terms, you must not access or use the Site.
acceptanceP2: You represent that you are at least 13 years of age, or the age of legal majority in your jurisdiction, whichever is greater. If you are under the required age, you may only use the Site under the supervision of a parent or legal guardian who agrees to be bound by these Terms.
servicesP1: OmniKit provides a suite of free, browser-based developer tools. All processing is performed locally in your web browser — no data is transmitted to our servers. Our current tools include:
servicesList1: Base64 Encode/Decode — Encode and decode Base64 strings, generate Basic Authentication headers
Password Generator — Generate secure, random, and memorable passwords
Text Hashing — Compute hashes using MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, SHA-3, Keccak, RIPEMD-160, and more
Text Encrypt/Decrypt — Encrypt and decrypt text using AES, DES, Triple DES, Rabbit, RC4, and other algorithms
File Checksum — Compute file checksums with support for unlimited file sizes
ASCII Table — Complete ASCII reference with conversions for hex, octal, HTML, and decimal
HTML Code — HTML special characters and entity reference
Storage Unit Conversion — Convert between byte, kilobyte, megabyte, terabyte, petabyte, and more
servicesP2: We may add, modify, or remove tools at any time without prior notice.
conductP1: You agree not to misuse the Site or its Services. Prohibited activities include, but are not limited to:
conductList1: Using the Site for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws or regulations
Attempting to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Site or its infrastructure
Interfering with or disrupting the Site's functionality, servers, or networks
Using automated scripts, bots, or scrapers to access the Site in a manner that exceeds reasonable use
Transmitting any malicious code, viruses, worms, or other harmful content
Copying, reproducing, or redistributing the Site's design, code, or content without prior written permission
conductP2: We reserve the right to restrict or block access to any user who violates these Terms at our sole discretion.
ipP1: The Site, including its original content, features, functionality, and design, is owned by OmniKit and is protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
ipP2: You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works of, publicly display, or exploit any content from the Site without our express written consent. The tools are provided for your personal and commercial use, but the Site itself and its source code remain our property.
advertisingP1: OmniKit is a free service supported by advertising. We may display advertisements on the Site provided by third-party ad networks. These partners may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to collect information about your browsing activity across different websites.
advertisingP2: By using the Site, you acknowledge and consent to the display of advertisements and the use of tracking technologies by our advertising partners as described in our Privacy Policy. You may opt out of personalized advertising through your browser settings or by visiting the opt-out pages provided by the respective ad networks.
advertisingP3: We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or practices of any advertisements displayed on the Site. Interactions with advertisers are solely between you and the advertiser.
disclaimerP1: The Services are provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
disclaimerP2: We do not guarantee that the Site will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free. The results produced by our tools are provided for informational purposes only. You should independently verify any results before relying on them for security-sensitive or mission-critical applications.
disclaimerP3: To the fullest extent permitted by law, OmniKit shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of data, profits, or goodwill, arising from your use of or inability to use the Site or Services.
changesP1: We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the Site after any changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
contactP1: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us.
